indicators.name: Cabinet
indicators.rationale: The cabinet is too large and obstructs the view of the workspace.

indicators.name: Microwave

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work due to the presence of large cabinets, a microwave, and a dining table that are too close to the workspace.
